Headline: Howard- bound Red Line Service Delayed Grand
ShortDescription: Howard-bound Red Line trains are standing at Grand due to a door problem on the train.  Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Howard-bound Red Line trains are standing at Grand due to a door problem on the train. 

At this time we are unloading the delayed train. An immediate follower will be arriving shortly. Crews are working to correct this problem. We apologize for any inconvenience and we appreciate your patience.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
